narrative:
Precinct Sylvania City 10 (precinct in Lucas County) has 990 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.2 percentage points.
